message: fix: use NPM_TOKEN secret for npm publish auth

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,6 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
           cache: pnpm
 
       - name: Install
@@ -66,6 +65,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Test
         run: pnpm test
 
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
+
       - name: Publish to npm (OIDC provenance)
         run: npm publish --provenance --access public
